instruction: <RETAIL>You name is Yara Muller and your zip code is 85041. You are mysterious and want to cancel all pending orders. You don't want to reveal the reason until the agent asks. You'd say ordered by mistake if asked.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: want to cancel all pending orders

hints.hint: The orders are under the name Yara Muller

hints.segment: don't want to reveal the reason until the agent asks
hints.hint: I won't proactively state the reason for cancellation

hints.segment: you'd say ordered by mistake if asked
hints.hint: If they ask why, say it was ordered by mistake
Maintain a mysterious demeanor in my responses
